irregularities.label: METADATA_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Rows 0, 1, 48 to 55 contain non-data information such as table title, notes, and footnotes.
irregularities.details: These rows do not follow the data structure and are used for additional information.

irregularities.label: MULTI_LEVEL_HEADER
irregularities.evidence: Row 2 has year labels (2011, 2016, 2021), Row 3 has sub-labels (Number, %). Together they form a 2-level header.

irregularities.label: INLINE_BILINGUAL
irregularities.evidence: Header cell [0]="種族\nEthnicity" contains Chinese and English separated by newline.
irregularities.details: Pattern appears in multiple header cells.

irregularities.label: WIDE_FORMAT
irregularities.evidence: Columns 3-8 encode year (2011, 2016, 2021) × value type (Number, %) as column headers.
irregularities.details: 3 year groups × 2 value types = 6 value columns that should be unpivoted.

irregularities.label: BILINGUAL_ALTERNATING_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Row 5 "亞洲人（非華人）" has data, Row 6 "Asian (other than Chinese)" has no numeric values. Pattern repeats for all ethnicities.
irregularities.details: Chinese rows contain numeric data, English rows are label-only.

irregularities.label: IMPLICIT_AGGREGATION_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Row 39 "所有少數族裔人士[3]" and Row 42 "撇除外籍家庭傭工後的所有少數族裔人士[3]" contain totals.
irregularities.details: Summary of all ethnicity detail rows above.

irregularities.label: SPARSE_ROW_FILL
irregularities.evidence: Column 0 (Year) is only filled at block starts (Row 5, 42, 45).
irregularities.details: Year values need to be forward-filled for the following rows.
